title: pfrest provider
description: Native pfSense REST API v2 (pfSense-pkg-RESTAPI, pfrest.org) OpenTofu/Terraform provider. Generic over the /api/v2 surface so pfSense imports to 0-diff via the manage-declared-only subset model. Stateless X-API-Key auth.

phases.title: Core (generic, full coverage)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source cover all /api/v2 endpoints.

items.feature: REST v2 transport (stateless X-API-Key header, GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE, {code,status,message,data} envelope unwrap, NotFound, insecure TLS)
pfrest_object resource (CRUD + ImportState; collection POST->data.id + ?id= addressing; singleton PATCH-in-place; singleton/collection switch via `singleton` bool)
Manage-declared-only drift: subset plan modifier (declared keys match device -> 0-diff; never clobbers unmanaged fields)
pfrest_object data source (read any endpoint; optional object_id -> ?id=)

phases.title: Validate against live pfSense (LAB ONLY)
phases.exit_criteria: A lab pfSense object imports to 0-diff and create/update/delete of a throwaway object succeeds through the provider.

items.feature: Lab pfSense reachable with REST API package + an X-API-Key in OpenBao (pfsense-lab / NetBox device 21 / VM 92003 on pve-gigabyte is OFFLINE; needs starting + RESTAPI pkg install + key)
Live import to 0-diff proven via dev_overrides binary: import an existing object, tofu plan = No changes
Live create/update/delete of a throwaway object on the lab box

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (alias, rule, vlan, gateway) over the generic core
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen
